TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Bubun, title = Bubun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bubun} }

S.FORM: = Bubun = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang bubun. 191 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 499 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 81% niqan 403 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 19% niqan 96 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal76%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq1%, Bunun1%, Amis2%, Hla'alua1%. Pusu nniqan alang Tgkingal bi bgurah ka kmlawa qmpah klwaan mniq kana nsgan alang Bubun nii. Nniqan alang Nyusan Nanto nsgan Jnaysyang alang Bubun. Gasuc nniqan Gaga mniq narac daya yayung Peykangsi ka alang Bubun, mniq babaw saw daya gqiyan hidaw kska dgiyaq Hehwansan hiya, hunac o Sungring, yabi hari hunac 1km o nniqan hnici seejiq sbiyaw qyqaya Yuanmukupopo ka seuxal ha, kika tgdaya bi yayung Peykangsi ka alang Bubun nii. Pkkla patas ppanun Mgrig rulu: Taypey>Elug klwaan tg3>Cungto ciyawryotaw>Elug127>Taycung Nanto elug kbiyax rulu >Cawtung ciyawriyotaw>Tay63ciya>To2>Elug Cungcgn>Elug Ciyawkwang>Elug yufu>To8>Elug yuping>Tay14>Elug Cungcgn>Elug Cungsan> Elug jnhe>Dhuq. Sjiqan klgan nealang Atayal. Djiyun kari Kari Atayal ni Tlu. Pnaah alang Cing siida,ruwan dxgal klwaan Mk-jixen, Mk-Bubul, Mk-Tata ni Mokupabo, pusu nniqan dha alang sayang o Bubun, kana nniqun alang o:Alang Mokupopo o mniq daya gqiyan hidaw 1km, alang Mokurihan o mniq sdalih hari daya 1km, alang Mokupabo o mniq hunac 1km, alang Mokupopo o skrayan yayung Peykang ni Bubun, mniq sipaw Bubun, daya sdalih dgiyaq Paykutasan, hunac hraan hidaw o yayung Peykangsi, gqiyan hidaw o yayung Pupuersi, ddgiyaq kana ka kssiyaw, egu bi qdrus, kika asi nniqan hini ka seejiq sbiyaw. Hngkawas 1912 idas 4, gaga nngalan seejiq nihung kana ka dxgal Mokurihan, sdalih alang Mokupop alang Cuse o mlih ni musa tliing Mukutata, tunux bi mtutul o SuluÔľéTapas, mdulun kana seejiq Maripacun musa tmciyuk, egu bi jiyax angal ka tnjiyal kika tuhuy tjiyal seejiq nihung siida, mniq idas 5 jiyax 3 siida hunac Mokutata o, strngan saw yayung Peykang ni yayung Pupuersi gqiyan hidaw hiya supu tjiyal seejiq nihung, kana paqan dha seejiq nihung o mtrul rima seejiq, mangal paru luqih seejiq o dha, bukuy do, kika seejiq nihung o dmurul bi ka meydang mniq seejiq hini, kika pnhyugan dha kingal tunux mniq hiya.(Gaga elug seuxal kika muda alang Bubun hiya). Mniq minkwo hngkawas 2,3 , musa kmalu kmlawa ka keysacu nihung, kika rnwaqan seejiq Mokutata tnhjil, sndha tnhjil nganguc, kingal o tnhjil musa Mokupapa, kingal o tnhjil musa Mokurihan. Qnbhangan saw tmciyuk Tanax Tunux siida, seejiq nihung o qnuqu dha iyux pusa egu bi mbbiyax alang Mokurihan musa tnjiyal teumal saw tmciyuk Tanax Tunux, kndadax dgiyaq Risan miyah teumal ka seejiq mbbiyax alang dha, pnaah hunac Sungring mtmay alang nii, qnbhangan o wana musa tmsamac, qmpahan o ungac lntulan, sngari na seejiq o wada paqun kana da, kika mlih egu bi seejiq. Kndadax saw qnrquran na knkla seejiq o, mnuda uda nii o mniq minkwo hngkawas 2(hngkawas 1913) idas 8, gaga muda "angal kana ka puniq Payko ni Maripa, miyah ka empsaping ka siida, sqama kana ka seejiq alang malepa ni seejiq alang makajixen, hmuya mnuda saw euda nii kika miyah mtmay alang ka empsaping nihung siida iyux angal kana ka puniq seejiq, kika anaqih bi kuxul seejiq nalang. Bukuy Kwanfu ka Taywan do, mniq daya alang Mokubapoce pnhyugan seyhu, tmhangan dha saw Bubun, supu dha alang Mokutata ni alang Mokupopo, sngari seejiq Mokurihan uri. bukuy mnhtu smalu ka elug rising do, kika tnhjil ssiyaw elug hini da, tmhangan dha "Marikwan", sngari mniq minkwo hngkawas 83, yasa yahan mrmuxan ka paru gbihur Tawke kika thjil hunac daya alang nniqan seuxal dha alang sbiyaw, tmhanagn "kungti"ni "bgurah Bubun". Pgkla patas rmigaw ‚óéPusu pnhyugan: Qmpah kmlawa seejiq sapah Keysacu Bubun.(04)25960040 546 Nsgan Jnay alang Bubun elug Bubun tg23.
S.PHON: = bubun = gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč bubun. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq*%, bunun*%, amis*%, ńßla'alua*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč tgkiŇčal bi bgu…ĺańß ka kmlawa qmpańß klwaan mniq kana nsgan alaŇč bubun nii. nniqan alaŇč njusan nanto nsgan …ünajsjaŇč alaŇč bubun. gasu ¶ nniqan gaga mniq na…ĺa ¶ daja jajuŇč p…ôkaŇčsi ka alaŇč bubun, mniq babaw saw daja gqijan ńßidaw kska dgijaq ńß…ôńßwansan ńßija, ńßuna ¶ o suŇč…ĺiŇč, jabi ńßa…ĺi ńßuna ¶ *km o nniqan ńßni ¶i s…ô…ô…üiq sbijaw qjqaja juanmukupopo ka s…ôuxal ńßa, kika tgdaja bi jajuŇč p…ôkaŇčsi ka alaŇč bubun nii. pkkla patas ppanun mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>…ôlug klwaan tg*> ¶uŇčto ¶ijaw…ĺjotaw>…ôlug***>taj ¶uŇč nanto …ôlug kbijax …ĺulu > ¶awtuŇč ¶ijaw…ĺijotaw>taj** ¶ija>to*>…ôlug ¶uŇč ¶gn>…ôlug ¶ijawkwaŇč>…ôlug ju*u>to*>…ôlug jupiŇč>taj**>…ôlug ¶uŇč ¶gn>…ôlug ¶uŇčsan> …ôlug …ünńß…ô>dńßuq. s…üiqan klgan n…ôalaŇč atajal. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi atajal ni tlu. pnaańß alaŇč ¶iŇč siida,…ĺuwan dxgal klwaan mk-…üix…ôn, mk-bubul, mk-tata ni mokupabo, pusu nniqan dńßa alaŇč sajaŇč o bubun, kana nniqun alaŇč o:alaŇč mokupopo o mniq daja gqijan ńßidaw *km, alaŇč moku…ĺińßan o mniq sdalińß ńßa…ĺi daja *km, alaŇč mokupabo o mniq ńßuna ¶ *km, alaŇč mokupopo o sk…ĺajan jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč ni bubun, mniq sipaw bubun, daja sdalińß dgijaq pajkutasan, ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o jajuŇč p…ôkaŇčsi, gqijan ńßidaw o jajuŇč pupu…ô…ĺsi, ddgijaq kana ka kssijaw, …ôgu bi qd…ĺus, kika asi nniqan ńßini ka s…ô…ô…üiq sbijaw. ńßŇčkawas **** idas *, gaga nŇčalan s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč kana ka dxgal moku…ĺińßan, sdalińß alaŇč mokupop alaŇč ¶us…ô o mlińß ni musa tliiŇč mukutata, tunux bi mtutul o sulu*tapas, mdulun kana s…ô…ô…üiq ma…ĺipa ¶un musa tm ¶ijuk, …ôgu bi …üijax aŇčal ka tn…üijal kika tuńßuj t…üijal s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč siida, mniq idas * …üijax * siida ńßuna ¶ mokutata o, st…ĺŇčan saw jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč ni jajuŇč pupu…ô…ĺsi gqijan ńßidaw ńßija supu t…üijal s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč, kana paqan dńßa s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč o mt…ĺul …ĺima s…ô…ô…üiq, maŇčal pa…ĺu luqińß s…ô…ô…üiq o dńßa, bukuj do, kika s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč o dmu…ĺul bi ka m…ôdaŇč mniq s…ô…ô…üiq ńßini, kika pnńßjugan dńßa kiŇčal tunux mniq ńßija.(gaga …ôlug s…ôuxal kika muda alaŇč bubun ńßija). mniq minkwo ńßŇčkawas *,* , musa kmalu kmlawa ka k…ôsa ¶u nińßuŇč, kika …ĺnwaqan s…ô…ô…üiq mokutata tnńß…üil, sndńßa tnńß…üil ŇčaŇču ¶, kiŇčal o tnńß…üil musa mokupapa, kiŇčal o tnńß…üil musa moku…ĺińßan. qnbńßaŇčan saw tm ¶ijuk tanax tunux siida, s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč o qnuqu dńßa ijux pusa …ôgu bi mbbijax alaŇč moku…ĺińßan musa tn…üijal t…ôumal saw tm ¶ijuk tanax tunux, kndadax dgijaq …ĺisan mijańß t…ôumal ka s…ô…ô…üiq mbbijax alaŇč dńßa, pnaańß ńßuna ¶ suŇč…ĺiŇč mtmaj alaŇč nii, qnbńßaŇčan o wana musa tmsama ¶, qmpańßan o uŇča ¶ lntulan, sŇča…ĺi na s…ô…ô…üiq o wada paqun kana da, kika mlińß …ôgu bi s…ô…ô…üiq. kndadax saw qn…ĺqu…ĺan na knkla s…ô…ô…üiq o, mnuda uda nii o mniq minkwo ńßŇčkawas *(ńßŇčkawas ****) idas *, gaga muda "aŇčal kana ka puniq pajko ni ma…ĺipa, mijańß ka …ômpsapiŇč ka siida, sqama kana ka s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč mal…ôpa ni s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč maka…üix…ôn, ńßmuja mnuda saw …ôuda nii kika mijańß mtmaj alaŇč ka …ômpsapiŇč nińßuŇč siida ijux aŇčal kana ka puniq s…ô…ô…üiq, kika anaqińß bi kuxul s…ô…ô…üiq nalaŇč. bukuj kwan*u ka tajwan do, mniq daja alaŇč mokubapo ¶…ô pnńßjugan s…ôńßu, tmńßaŇčan dńßa saw bubun, supu dńßa alaŇč mokutata ni alaŇč mokupopo, sŇča…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq moku…ĺińßan u…ĺi. bukuj mnńßtu smalu ka …ôlug …ĺisiŇč do, kika tnńß…üil ssijaw …ôlug ńßini da, tmńßaŇčan dńßa "ma…ĺikwan", sŇča…ĺi mniq minkwo ńßŇčkawas **, jasa jańßan m…ĺmuxan ka pa…ĺu gbińßu…ĺ tawk…ô kika tńß…üil ńßuna ¶ daja alaŇč nniqan s…ôuxal dńßa alaŇč sbijaw, tmńßanagn "kuŇčti"ni "bgu…ĺańß bubun". pgkla patas …ĺmigaw *pusu pnńßjugan: qmpańß kmlawa s…ô…ô…üiq sapańß k…ôsa ¶u bubun.(**)******** *** nsgan …ünaj alaŇč bubun …ôlug bubun tg**.
S.FORM: = Bubun = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang bubun. 191 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 499 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 81% niqan 403 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 19% niqan 96 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal76%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq1%, Bunun1%, Amis2%, Hla'alua1%. Pusu nniqan alang Tgkingal bi bgurah ka kmlawa qmpah klwaan mniq kana nsgan alang Bubun nii. Nniqan alang Nyusan Nanto nsgan Jnaysyang alang Bubun. Gasuc nniqan Gaga mniq narac daya yayung Peykangsi ka alang Bubun, mniq babaw saw daya gqiyan hidaw kska dgiyaq Hehwansan hiya, hunac o Sungring, yabi hari hunac 1km o nniqan hnici seejiq sbiyaw qyqaya Yuanmukupopo ka seuxal ha, kika tgdaya bi yayung Peykangsi ka alang Bubun nii. Pkkla patas ppanun Mgrig rulu: Taypey>Elug klwaan tg3>Cungto ciyawryotaw>Elug127>Taycung Nanto elug kbiyax rulu >Cawtung ciyawriyotaw>Tay63ciya>To2>Elug Cungcgn>Elug Ciyawkwang>Elug yufu>To8>Elug yuping>Tay14>Elug Cungcgn>Elug Cungsan> Elug jnhe>Dhuq. Sjiqan klgan nealang Atayal. Djiyun kari Kari Atayal ni Tlu. Pnaah alang Cing siida,ruwan dxgal klwaan Mk-jixen, Mk-Bubul, Mk-Tata ni Mokupabo, pusu nniqan dha alang sayang o Bubun, kana nniqun alang o:Alang Mokupopo o mniq daya gqiyan hidaw 1km, alang Mokurihan o mniq sdalih hari daya 1km, alang Mokupabo o mniq hunac 1km, alang Mokupopo o skrayan yayung Peykang ni Bubun, mniq sipaw Bubun, daya sdalih dgiyaq Paykutasan, hunac hraan hidaw o yayung Peykangsi, gqiyan hidaw o yayung Pupuersi, ddgiyaq kana ka kssiyaw, egu bi qdrus, kika asi nniqan hini ka seejiq sbiyaw. Hngkawas 1912 idas 4, gaga nngalan seejiq nihung kana ka dxgal Mokurihan, sdalih alang Mokupop alang Cuse o mlih ni musa tliing Mukutata, tunux bi mtutul o SuluÔľéTapas, mdulun kana seejiq Maripacun musa tmciyuk, egu bi jiyax angal ka tnjiyal kika tuhuy tjiyal seejiq nihung siida, mniq idas 5 jiyax 3 siida hunac Mokutata o, strngan saw yayung Peykang ni yayung Pupuersi gqiyan hidaw hiya supu tjiyal seejiq nihung, kana paqan dha seejiq nihung o mtrul rima seejiq, mangal paru luqih seejiq o dha, bukuy do, kika seejiq nihung o dmurul bi ka meydang mniq seejiq hini, kika pnhyugan dha kingal tunux mniq hiya.(Gaga elug seuxal kika muda alang Bubun hiya). Mniq minkwo hngkawas 2,3 , musa kmalu kmlawa ka keysacu nihung, kika rnwaqan seejiq Mokutata tnhjil, sndha tnhjil nganguc, kingal o tnhjil musa Mokupapa, kingal o tnhjil musa Mokurihan. Qnbhangan saw tmciyuk Tanax Tunux siida, seejiq nihung o qnuqu dha iyux pusa egu bi mbbiyax alang Mokurihan musa tnjiyal teumal saw tmciyuk Tanax Tunux, kndadax dgiyaq Risan miyah teumal ka seejiq mbbiyax alang dha, pnaah hunac Sungring mtmay alang nii, qnbhangan o wana musa tmsamac, qmpahan o ungac lntulan, sngari na seejiq o wada paqun kana da, kika mlih egu bi seejiq. Kndadax saw qnrquran na knkla seejiq o, mnuda uda nii o mniq minkwo hngkawas 2(hngkawas 1913) idas 8, gaga muda "angal kana ka puniq Payko ni Maripa, miyah ka empsaping ka siida, sqama kana ka seejiq alang malepa ni seejiq alang makajixen, hmuya mnuda saw euda nii kika miyah mtmay alang ka empsaping nihung siida iyux angal kana ka puniq seejiq, kika anaqih bi kuxul seejiq nalang. Bukuy Kwanfu ka Taywan do, mniq daya alang Mokubapoce pnhyugan seyhu, tmhangan dha saw Bubun, supu dha alang Mokutata ni alang Mokupopo, sngari seejiq Mokurihan uri. bukuy mnhtu smalu ka elug rising do, kika tnhjil ssiyaw elug hini da, tmhangan dha "Marikwan", sngari mniq minkwo hngkawas 83, yasa yahan mrmuxan ka paru gbihur Tawke kika thjil hunac daya alang nniqan seuxal dha alang sbiyaw, tmhanagn "kungti"ni "bgurah Bubun". Pgkla patas rmigaw ‚óéPusu pnhyugan: Qmpah kmlawa seejiq sapah Keysacu Bubun.(04)25960040 546 Nsgan Jnay alang Bubun elug Bubun tg23.
S.PHON: = bubun = gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč bubun. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq*%, bunun*%, amis*%, ńßla'alua*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč tgkiŇčal bi bgu…ĺańß ka kmlawa qmpańß klwaan mniq kana nsgan alaŇč bubun nii. nniqan alaŇč njusan nanto nsgan …ünajsjaŇč alaŇč bubun. gasu ¶ nniqan gaga mniq na…ĺa ¶ daja jajuŇč p…ôkaŇčsi ka alaŇč bubun, mniq babaw saw daja gqijan ńßidaw kska dgijaq ńß…ôńßwansan ńßija, ńßuna ¶ o suŇč…ĺiŇč, jabi ńßa…ĺi ńßuna ¶ *km o nniqan ńßni ¶i s…ô…ô…üiq sbijaw qjqaja juanmukupopo ka s…ôuxal ńßa, kika tgdaja bi jajuŇč p…ôkaŇčsi ka alaŇč bubun nii. pkkla patas ppanun mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>…ôlug klwaan tg*> ¶uŇčto ¶ijaw…ĺjotaw>…ôlug***>taj ¶uŇč nanto …ôlug kbijax …ĺulu > ¶awtuŇč ¶ijaw…ĺijotaw>taj** alaŇč ¶iŇč siida,…ĺuwan dxgal klwaan mk-…üix…ôn, mk-bubul, mk-tata ni mokupabo, pusu nniqan dńßa alaŇč sajaŇč o bubun, kana nniqun alaŇč o:alaŇč mokupopo o mniq daja gqijan ńßidaw *km, alaŇč moku…ĺińßan o mniq sdalińß ńßa…ĺi daja *km, alaŇč mokupabo o mniq ńßuna ¶ *km, alaŇč mokupopo o sk…ĺajan jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč ni bubun, mniq sipaw bubun, daja sdalińß dgijaq pajkutasan, ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o jajuŇč p…ôkaŇčsi, gqijan ńßidaw o jajuŇč pupu…ô…ĺsi, ddgijaq kana ka kssijaw, …ôgu bi qd…ĺus, kika asi nniqan ńßini ka s…ô…ô…üiq sbijaw. ńßŇčkawas **** idas *, gaga nŇčalan s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč kana ka dxgal moku…ĺińßan, sdalińß alaŇč mokupop alaŇč ¶us…ô o mlińß ni musa tliiŇč mukutata, tunux bi mtutul o sulu*tapas, mdulun kana s…ô…ô…üiq ma…ĺipa ¶un musa tm ¶ijuk, …ôgu bi …üijax aŇčal ka tn…üijal kika tuńßuj t…üijal s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč siida, mniq idas * …üijax * siida ńßuna ¶ mokutata o, st…ĺŇčan saw jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč ni jajuŇč pupu…ô…ĺsi gqijan ńßidaw ńßija supu t…üijal s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč, kana paqan dńßa s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč o mt…ĺul …ĺima s…ô…ô…üiq, maŇčal pa…ĺu luqińß s…ô…ô…üiq o dńßa, bukuj do, kika s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč o dmu…ĺul bi ka m…ôdaŇč mniq s…ô…ô…üiq ńßini, kika pnńßjugan dńßa kiŇčal tunux mniq ńßija.(gaga …ôlug s…ôuxal kika muda alaŇč bubun ńßija). mniq minkwo ńßŇčkawas *,* , musa kmalu kmlawa ka k…ôsa ¶u nińßuŇč, kika …ĺnwaqan s…ô…ô…üiq mokutata tnńß…üil, sndńßa tnńß…üil ŇčaŇču ¶, kiŇčal o tnńß…üil musa mokupapa, kiŇčal o tnńß…üil musa moku…ĺińßan. qnbńßaŇčan saw tm ¶ijuk tanax tunux siida, s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč o qnuqu dńßa ijux pusa …ôgu bi mbbijax alaŇč moku…ĺińßan musa tn…üijal t…ôumal saw tm ¶ijuk tanax tunux, kndadax dgijaq …ĺisan mijańß t…ôumal ka s…ô…ô…üiq mbbijax alaŇč dńßa, pnaańß ńßuna ¶ suŇč…ĺiŇč mtmaj alaŇč nii, qnbńßaŇčan o wana musa tmsama ¶, qmpańßan o uŇča ¶ lntulan, sŇča…ĺi na s…ô…ô…üiq o wada paqun kana da, kika mlińß …ôgu bi s…ô…ô…üiq. kndadax saw qn…ĺqu…ĺan na knkla s…ô…ô…üiq o, mnuda uda nii o mniq minkwo ńßŇčkawas *(ńßŇčkawas ****) idas *, gaga muda "aŇčal kana ka puniq pajko ni ma…ĺipa, mijańß ka …ômpsapiŇč ka siida, sqama kana ka s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč mal…ôpa ni s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč maka…üix…ôn, ńßmuja mnuda saw …ôuda nii kika mijańß mtmaj alaŇč ka …ômpsapiŇč nińßuŇč siida ijux aŇčal kana ka puniq s…ô…ô…üiq, kika anaqińß bi kuxul s…ô…ô…üiq nalaŇč. bukuj kwan*u ka tajwan do, mniq daja alaŇč mokubapo ¶…ô pnńßjugan s…ôńßu, tmńßaŇčan dńßa saw bubun, supu dńßa alaŇč mokutata ni alaŇč mokupopo, sŇča…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq moku…ĺińßan u…ĺi. bukuj mnńßtu smalu ka …ôlug …ĺisiŇč do, kika tnńß…üil ssijaw …ôlug ńßini da, tmńßaŇčan dńßa "ma…ĺikwan", sŇča…ĺi mniq minkwo ńßŇčkawas **, jasa jańßan m…ĺmuxan ka pa…ĺu gbińßu…ĺ tawk…ô kika tńß…üil ńßuna ¶ daja alaŇč nniqan s…ôuxal dńßa alaŇč sbijaw, tmńßanagn "kuŇčti"ni "bgu…ĺańß bubun". pgkla patas …ĺmigaw *pusu pnńßjugan: qmpańß kmlawa s…ô…ô…üiq sapańß k…ôsa ¶u bubun.(**)******** *** nsgan …ünaj alaŇč bubun …ôlug bubun tg**.
